QuartzRestApi
Table of Contents

Class ApiKeyProfile

Namespace
QuartzRestApi.Security
Assembly
QuartzRestApi.dll

Represents a named API key profile that controls which Scheduler endpoints the bearer of ApiKey is allowed to call.

public sealed class ApiKeyProfile
Inheritance
object
ApiKeyProfile
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Examples

// Admin profile — full access to all endpoints.
var admin = ApiKeyProfile.AllowAll("Admin", "key-admin-xyz789");

// Read-only profile — start with no access, then selectively enable query endpoints.
var readOnly = ApiKeyProfile.DenyAll("ReadOnly", "key-readonly-abc123");
readOnly.SchedulerName          = true;
readOnly.SchedulerInstanceId    = true;
readOnly.GetMetaData            = true;
readOnly.GetJobGroupNames       = true;
readOnly.GetTriggerGroupNames   = true;
readOnly.GetJobKeys             = true;
readOnly.GetJobDetail           = true;
readOnly.GetTrigger             = true;
readOnly.GetTriggerState        = true;
readOnly.GetCurrentlyExecutingJobs = true;

var host = new SchedulerHost("http://localhost:45000", scheduler, logger,
    profiles: [admin, readOnly]);

// Persist a profile to disk and reload it:
File.WriteAllText("readOnly.json", readOnly.ToJson());
var loaded = ApiKeyProfile.FromJson(File.ReadAllText("readOnly.json"));

Remarks

Every endpoint has a corresponding bool property on this class. All properties default to true (full access). Set a property to false to block that endpoint for this profile.

The profile can be persisted to JSON with ToJson() and restored with FromJson(string), making it easy to store profiles in a configuration file or database.

Constructors

ApiKeyProfile()

Parameterless constructor used during JSON deserialization.

[JsonConstructor]
public ApiKeyProfile()

Properties

AddCalendar

Allows access to POST Scheduler/AddCalendar.
Corresponds to AddCalendar(BaseCalendar).

public bool AddCalendar { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

AddJob

Allows access to POST Scheduler/AddJob.
Corresponds to AddJob(JobDetail).

public bool AddJob { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

ApiKey

The secret API key that identifies this profile. Sent by the client in the X-Api-Key HTTP header.

public string ApiKey { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Allows access to GET Scheduler/CheckExistsJobKey.
Corresponds to CheckExists(JobKey).

public bool CheckExistsJobKey { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Allows access to GET Scheduler/CheckExistsTriggerKey.
Corresponds to CheckExists(TriggerKey).

public bool CheckExistsTriggerKey { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Allows access to POST Scheduler/Clear.
Corresponds to Clear().

public bool Clear { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Corresponds to DeleteCalendar(string).

Corresponds to DeleteJob(JobKey).

Methods

AllowAll(string, string)

Creates a new ApiKeyProfile with access to all endpoints enabled. Use this as a starting point for an admin profile, or selectively set properties to false to restrict access.

public static ApiKeyProfile AllowAll(string name, string apiKey)

Parameters

name string

A human-readable name for this profile, used in log messages.

apiKey string

The secret API key for this profile, sent in the X-Api-Key header.

Returns

ApiKeyProfile

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when name or apiKey is null or empty.

DenyAll(string, string)

Creates a new ApiKeyProfile with access to all endpoints denied. Use this as a starting point for a restricted profile, then selectively set properties to true to grant access to specific endpoints.

public static ApiKeyProfile DenyAll(string name, string apiKey)

Parameters

name string

A human-readable name for this profile, used in log messages.

apiKey string

The secret API key for this profile, sent in the X-Api-Key header.

Returns

ApiKeyProfile

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when name or apiKey is null or empty.

FromJson(string)

Deserializes an ApiKeyProfile from a JSON string produced by ToJson().

public static ApiKeyProfile FromJson(string json)

Parameters

json string

The JSON string to deserialize.

Returns

ApiKeyProfile

The deserialized ApiKeyProfile.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when json is null or whitespace.

JsonException

Thrown when json is not valid JSON.

ToJson()

Serializes this profile to an indented JSON string.

public string ToJson()

Returns

string

A JSON representation of this profile.
